title: Turkish Lamb Kebab with Chinese Twist
description: A flavorful fusion of Turkish and Chinese cuisines, featuring tender lamb kebabs with a sweet and savory sauce.

ingredients.name: Kebab Meat Marinade
ingredients.notes: Combine soy sauce, hoisin sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger

ingredients.name: Chinese Five-Spice Powder
ingredients.notes: Add to marinade for extra flavor

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine lamb pieces, onions, doner kebab meat, kebab meat marinade, and Chinese five-spice powder. Mix well.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
4. Remove the lamb mixture from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for 30 minutes.
5. Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Brush the coconut oil onto the kebabs and season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
8. Serve the kebabs hot with your favorite sides, such as steamed vegetables or rice.
